'''âr-k-b-w''' ('''karakbewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:technicize|technicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-k-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:technicize|technicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-k-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| karakbewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirakbewoko|thirakbewoko]] || [[word:jirakbewoko|jirakbewoko]] || [[word:shirakbewoko|shirakbewoko]] || [[word:kirakbewoko|kirakbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurakbewoko|thuthurakbewoko]] || [[word:jujurakbewoko|jujurakbewoko]] || [[word:shushurakbewoko|shushurakbewoko]] || [[word:kukurakbewoko|kukurakbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurakbewoko|thurakbewoko]] || [[word:jurakbewoko|jurakbewoko]] || [[word:shurakbewoko|shurakbewoko]] || [[word:kurakbewoko|kurakbewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurakbewoko|thurakbewoko]] || [[word:jurakbewoko|jurakbewoko]] || [[word:shurakbewoko|shurakbewoko]] || [[word:kurakbewoko|kurakbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therakbewoko|therakbewoko]] || [[word:jerakbewoko|jerakbewoko]] || [[word:sherakbewoko|sherakbewoko]] || [[word:kerakbewoko|kerakbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorakbewoko|thothorakbewoko]] || [[word:jojorakbewoko|jojorakbewoko]] || [[word:shoshorakbewoko|shoshorakbewoko]] || [[word:kokorakbewoko|kokorakbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorakbewoko|thorakbewoko]] || [[word:jorakbewoko|jorakbewoko]] || [[word:shorakbewoko|shorakbewoko]] || [[word:korakbewoko|korakbewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorakbewoko|thorakbewoko]] || [[word:jorakbewoko|jorakbewoko]] || [[word:shorakbewoko|shorakbewoko]] || [[word:korakbewoko|korakbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrakbewoko|thĂŠrakbewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrakbewoko|jĂŠrakbewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrakbewoko|shĂŠrakbewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrakbewoko|kĂŠrakbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharakbewoko|thatharakbewoko]] || [[word:jajarakbewoko|jajarakbewoko]] || [[word:shasharakbewoko|shasharakbewoko]] || [[word:kakarakbewoko|kakarakbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharakbewoko|tharakbewoko]] || [[word:jarakbewoko|jarakbewoko]] || [[word:sharakbewoko|sharakbewoko]] || [[word:karakbewoko|karakbewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharakbewoko|tharakbewoko]] || [[word:jarakbewoko|jarakbewoko]] || [[word:sharakbewoko|sharakbewoko]] || [[word:karakbewoko|karakbewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
